titles.title: Stand Up, and Bless the Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Stand up, and bless the Lord, Ye people of His choice; Stand up, and bless the Lord your God With heart, and soul, and voice.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Though high above all praise, Above all blessing high, Who would not fear His holy Name, And laud and magnify?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, for the living flame From His won altar brought, To touch our lips, our minds inspire, And wing to Heav’n our thought.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God is our strength and song, And His salvation ours; Then be His love in Christ proclaimed With all our ransomed powers.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Stand up, and bless the Lord, The Lord your God adore; Stand up, and bless His glorious Name Hence forth for ever more.
